title: Constructivist Classic Car Editorial Grid AI
sourceTitle: Constructivist Classic Car Editorial Grid AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: 16:9 2x2 constructivist classic-car editorial grid for four fictional classic cars rendered as sleek constructivist editorial posters, featuring VOL 01 / ROAD ICONS. Subject: four fictional classic cars rendered as sleek constructivist editorial posters fills the four poster cells with photoreal automotive proportions, real-world materials, studio-lit bodywork, and distinct heroic vehicle silhouettes. Scene: 2x2 grid, harsh geometric angles, muted chic colors, micro-text columns and page numbers defines the four-panel editorial layout system with harsh geometric angles, industrial poster blocks, muted chic colors, micro-text columns, page numbers, and premium magazine structure. Composition: Fixed 16:9 2x2 grid: four iconic car poster cells, each car centered as a photoreal hero, constructivist diagonals and industrial blocks framing the vehicles, editorial magazine micro-text and page numbers overlaying the layout without covering vehicle forms. Signature Elements: 2x2 classic-car grid, Soviet constructivist diagonals, contemporary fashion campaign minimalism, editorial micro-text, page numbers, Risograph halftone grain, photoreal car materials, and high-budget automotive poster finish. Style: Contemporary fashion campaign polish blended with Soviet Constructivist design: ultra-clean, sleek, high-budget, commanding geometric dominance, editorial magazine layout precision, and subtle Risograph halftone print texture. Color Palette: Muted chic fashion-campaign colors mixed with red, black, cream, graphite, industrial gray, and restrained accent blocks; each quadrant remains coherent but clearly part of one grid system. Lighting: Clean studio automotive lighting, controlled reflections on paint and chrome, crisp shadow under each car, and flat graphic poster contrast in the geometric background. Camera: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Materials: Gloss car paint, chrome, rubber tires, glass, studio floor reflections, Risograph halftone dots, printed paper grain, sharp vector-like geometric poster blocks, and magazine ink texture. Typography: VOL 01 / ROAD ICONS appears as the main editorial title, volume label, micro-text columns, elegant page numbers, and small captions with perfect kerning and readable hierarchy. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
